metadata.name: Equity Strategy Research Universe
metadata.purpose: broad candidate library for systematic research, not a claim that any strategy is profitable or suitable
metadata.current_engine_constraint: Portfolio Builder is long-only; long-short and intraday definitions are marked research-only where incompatible.
metadata.selection_rule: No strategy may be recommended until it passes the shared out-of-sample, cost, stability, capacity and multiple-testing controls.

strategies.name: Buy and Hold Baseline
strategies.description: Always invested benchmark for each stock.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Any active strategy must beat a simple passive exposure after costs and risk adjustment.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

signal_logic.exit: end of evaluation or eligibility failure

strategies.name: Equal Weight Rebalance
strategies.description: Equal weights across eligible securities.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Diversification and regular rebalancing can provide a transparent benchmark.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

strategies.name: Sector-Neutral Equal Weight
strategies.description: Equal sector sleeves, equal weight within each sleeve.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Sector balancing reduces dominance by the largest GICS sectors.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

signal_logic.rebalance: equal sector budget then equal names

strategies.name: Inverse Volatility Allocation
strategies.description: Allocate inversely to recent volatility.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Lower-volatility names receive larger weights, reducing concentration in unstable stocks.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

strategies.name: Equal Risk Contribution
strategies.description: Risk-parity allocation across stocks.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Equalizing marginal risk contribution can produce more balanced portfolios than capital weights.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

strategies.name: Long-Only Minimum Variance
strategies.description: Minimum-variance portfolio under concentration constraints.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Covariance-aware allocation may lower portfolio volatility.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

strategies.name: Maximum Diversification
strategies.description: Maximize weighted constituent volatility divided by portfolio volatility.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Diversification ratio rewards distinct sources of risk.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

strategies.name: Hierarchical Risk Parity
strategies.description: Cluster correlations and allocate recursively by cluster variance.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Hierarchical allocation may be more stable than inverse covariance optimization.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

strategies.name: Minimum CVaR Allocation
strategies.description: Minimize expected loss beyond a selected tail percentile.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Tail-loss optimization may better align with drawdown-sensitive profiles.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

strategies.name: Core Multi-Model Allocation
strategies.description: Blend equal weight, inverse volatility, minimum variance and momentum tilt.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Combining simple independent allocators may reduce model-specific failure.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

features.name: component_weights
features.formula: weights from EW, inverse-vol, min-var, momentum

strategies.name: SMA 20/100 Trend
strategies.description: Long-only moving-average trend rule.
strategies.research_hypothesis: close above slow SMA with fast/slow confirmation

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

signal_logic.exit: fast_ma <= slow_ma or trailing stop

strategies.name: SMA 50/200 Trend
strategies.description: Long-only moving-average trend rule.
strategies.research_hypothesis: classic medium/long trend filter

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

signal_logic.exit: fast_ma <= slow_ma or trailing stop

strategies.name: EMA 12/26 Trend
strategies.description: Long-only moving-average trend rule.
strategies.research_hypothesis: faster exponential moving-average trend

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

signal_logic.exit: fast_ma <= slow_ma or trailing stop

strategies.name: EMA 50/150 Trend
strategies.description: Long-only moving-average trend rule.
strategies.research_hypothesis: medium exponential trend

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

signal_logic.exit: fast_ma <= slow_ma or trailing stop

strategies.name: Triple Moving Average Alignment
strategies.description: Long-only moving-average trend rule.
strategies.research_hypothesis: short above medium above long

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

signal_logic.exit: fast_ma <= slow_ma or trailing stop

strategies.name: Donchian Breakout 20
strategies.description: Buy a new rolling high and exit on a shorter rolling low.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Persistent price trends can continue after breakouts.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

signal_logic.exit: close < prior lower_channel or ATR stop

strategies.description: Buy a new rolling high and exit on a shorter rolling low.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Persistent price trends can continue after breakouts.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

signal_logic.exit: close < prior lower_channel or ATR stop

strategies.name: Price Above 200-Day Average
strategies.description: Stay invested only above a long moving average.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Long-term trend filtering may avoid prolonged bear markets.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

signal_logic.exit: close<sma_200

strategies.name: MACD Trend
strategies.description: MACD line and signal crossover with long-trend filter.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Changes in medium-term momentum can identify trend transitions.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

signal_logic.exit: macd<=signal

strategies.name: ADX Directional Trend
strategies.description: Trade positive directional movement when trend strength is high.
strategies.research_hypothesis: ADX can suppress trades in directionless regimes.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

signal_logic.exit: -DI>=+DI or ADX weakens

strategies.name: ATR Supertrend
strategies.description: ATR-band trailing trend state.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Volatility-adjusted bands can follow trends while adapting to changing noise.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

signal_logic.exit: supertrend flips bearish

strategies.name: Keltner Channel Breakout
strategies.description: Enter above an EMA plus ATR envelope.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Volatility-normalized breakouts may distinguish trends from ordinary noise.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

signal_logic.exit: close<ema or ATR stop

strategies.name: Monthly Absolute Trend
strategies.description: Monthly close above 10-month moving average.
strategies.research_hypothesis: A slow trend filter limits turnover and targets persistent regimes.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

signal_logic.exit: month-end close<=10m SMA

strategies.name: Time-Series Momentum 21D
strategies.description: Long when trailing total return is positive, optionally volatility scaled.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Positive own-asset momentum may persist over intermediate horizons.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

signal_logic.exit: trailing_return<=0 or risk stop

strategies.name: Cross-Sectional Momentum 63D
strategies.description: Rank eligible stocks by formation-period return excluding the most recent skip period.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Relative winners may continue outperforming relative losers.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

signal_logic.selection: top quantile; long only
signal_logic.exit: falls below retention quantile

strategies.name: 52-Week High Proximity
strategies.description: Rank by closeness to the trailing 52-week high.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Prices near long-horizon highs may signal persistent investor underreaction.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

signal_logic.selection: top proximity quantile with positive trend

strategies.name: Risk-Adjusted Momentum
strategies.description: Rank trailing return divided by realized volatility.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Scaling momentum by risk may avoid selecting only the most volatile winners.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

signal_logic.selection: top score quantile

strategies.name: Residual Momentum
strategies.description: Rank momentum after removing market and sector return components.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Idiosyncratic momentum may be less exposed to broad sector crowding.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

features.name: residual_return
features.formula: OLS residual versus market and sector factors

signal_logic.selection: top residual momentum quantile

strategies.name: Sector-Relative Momentum
strategies.description: Rank each stock relative to its GICS sector peers.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Sector neutralization targets stock-specific leadership.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

signal_logic.selection: top relative score within each sector

strategies.name: Dual Momentum Filter
strategies.description: Require positive absolute momentum and high relative momentum.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Combining absolute and relative strength may avoid buying leaders during broad downtrends.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

signal_logic.selection: positive absolute score and top relative quantile

strategies.name: RSI(2) Pullback
strategies.description: Long-only oversold reversion rule with liquidity and trend filters.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Short-horizon overreaction may partially reverse in liquid stocks.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

signal_logic.entry: RSI below entry threshold while above long trend; exit on RSI rebound
signal_logic.exit: mean reached, time stop, or risk stop

strategies.name: RSI(14) Oversold
strategies.description: Long-only oversold reversion rule with liquidity and trend filters.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Short-horizon overreaction may partially reverse in liquid stocks.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

signal_logic.entry: RSI below threshold; exit near neutral
signal_logic.exit: mean reached, time stop, or risk stop

signal_logic.entry: close below lower band; exit at moving average
signal_logic.exit: mean reached, time stop, or risk stop

strategies.name: 1-Day Cross-Sectional Reversal
strategies.description: Buy recent underperformers subject to quality, liquidity and trend controls.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Very short-horizon liquidity shocks and overreaction may reverse.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

signal_logic.selection: bottom return quantile but long-term trend not broken

strategies.name: 5-Day Cross-Sectional Reversal
strategies.description: Buy recent underperformers subject to quality, liquidity and trend controls.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

strategies.name: Opening Gap Reversion
strategies.description: Fade statistically extreme overnight gaps when no known corporate event is present.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Non-information gaps can partially mean revert after the open.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

signal_logic.entry: negative gap_z below threshold and event_flag false
signal_logic.exit: previous close, VWAP, time stop or risk stop

strategies.name: Intraday VWAP Reversion
strategies.description: Buy large negative deviations from session VWAP under stable spread and volume conditions.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Temporary order-flow imbalances may revert toward fair intraday price.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

signal_logic.entry: vwap_z below threshold with spread and trend filters
signal_logic.exit: VWAP touch or time stop

strategies.name: Peer-Relative Price Reversion
strategies.description: Buy a stock unusually weak versus same sub-industry peers when fundamentals and events do not explain the gap.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Temporary peer-relative dislocations may normalize.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

features.name: peer_residual
features.formula: stock return minus beta-adjusted peer basket return

signal_logic.exit: z returns toward zero

strategies.name: Value Composite
strategies.description: Rank stocks on value composite signals using sector-neutral winsorized z-scores.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Cheaper firms may earn a value premium, but sector and distress controls are required.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

strategies.name: Value plus Quality

strategies.research_hypothesis: Quality filters can reduce value traps while retaining valuation discipline.

strategies.name: Cointegrated Peer Pair
strategies.description: Relative-value research strategy based on cointegration residual z-score.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Closely related securities can temporarily diverge and later converge, but structural breaks are common.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

signal_logic.exit: spread converges, time stop, or structural-break test fails

strategies.name: Single-Asset Volatility Target
strategies.description: Scale exposure to target annualized volatility.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Dynamic risk control can reduce exposure when estimated risk rises, though whipsaw and estimation error remain.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

signal_logic.overlay: multiply base target weight by bounded risk scalar

strategies.name: Post-Earnings Announcement Drift
strategies.description: Event-aware strategy using standardized earnings surprise plus same-direction price reaction.
strategies.research_hypothesis: Public events can create delayed adjustment, forced flows, or predictable risk windows, but timestamp precision is essential.

engine_compatibility.notes: Long-only variant is required for Portfolio Builder; short legs, if listed, remain research-only.

features.name: event_feature
features.formula: standardized earnings surprise plus same-direction price reaction

features.name: abnormal_return
features.formula: stock return minus market/sector expected return

signal_logic.entry: event-specific condition after timestamp and execution lag
signal_logic.exit: event horizon, reversal, or risk stop
